steps.title: Identify the metaphorical shift
steps.content: The strongest clue is “Fires said we were home, we had drawn the circle, we were safe through the night.” This shifts from practical facts about fires (heating, fog) to metaphorical language revealing their emotional and symbolic meaning.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the answer
steps.content:
The underlined portion shows that fires provide comfort beyond physical warmth.

The metaphor shows that fires represent emotional security—home, safety, belonging—not just heat.

The other choices misread the content or misidentify the function.

That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
